Our Work
in Action

Managed Social Media

Social media done for you, from start to finish. We handle everything – strategy, content, and execution – to bring more customers into your business and keep your feed buzzing with results.

Creative Video Ads

Crush your goals with video ads that stop the scroll and get results. Let’s help you squeeze every penny out of your ad spend with content that grabs attention and gets people clicking!

Sales Videos

The fastest way to boost sales on your website? A killer sales video. We blend consumer psychology into our copy to create videos that drive more conversions and put more money in your pocket.

Spokesperson Videos

The secret to standing out in the AI age? A real human. Eye contact is a surefire way to make a connection and build trust with your viewers.

Create Spokesperson Ad

Unlock the Power of 
Social Media For Your Business

Most businesses post on social media and see... nothing. No engagement, no growth, no results. That’s because they’re missing the secret sauce: building a personality-driven brand.

At Kraken Media, we create content around a subject matter expert-a voice of authority in your niche. Someone your audience wants to listen to, and looks to for real value. By positioning you as the go-to expert, we make sure your content doesn’t just sit there. It grabs attention. It educates. It drives action. And ultimately, it grows your business.

Spokesperson Videos
Your Secret to More Conversions

A tech company needed a comprehensive video series to enhance their internal training modules. We designed an engaging e-learning solution with animated explainer videos, interactive segments, and instructor-led walkthroughs. This approach significantly improved the company’s course completion rate and kept their team motivated to learn, resulting in a more knowledgeable and confident workforce.

Copywriting
That Converts

Great ads don’t just look good - they speak directly to your audience. That’s where most businesses get it wrong. They’re focused on design and forget the most important part: the words.

At Kraken Media, we write copy that cuts through the noise. Copy with curiosity and hooky lines that leave viewers saying, “I’d watch that.” We don’t just write words to fill space; we build ad concepts that snap attention, build a call-to-action, or grab readers by the collar. We don’t just grab attention - we drive conversions.

We’re All About 
That Converts

At Kraken Media, we don’t chase vanity metrics. Likes, views, and “brand exposure” are nice, but they don’t pay the bills. We focus on what actually matters and the results that grow your business.

Our approach is outcome-oriented. We look for the real numbers: leads, revenue, and conversions. We design each video project with a goal in mind - we look beyond the view count and push people to watch, act, and then buy or take action. Because at the end of the day, results are what really matter.

Ready to See Real Results?

Let’s create video content that doesn’t just look great but drives measurable growth for your business!
Book Your Free Consultation
